reviews.review_description: Some areas look cute/beautiful but no one is online. A little buggy.

The graphics are good and looks fun but when I downloaded the game and started it up for some reason it damage my quest 1 data: floor, Guardian, etc. Not sure if it's the latest update for the quest 1 or the app itself. everything was fine till I installed the app.

I would like to specifically talk about the game "Totoro Run". It's just a small game, but it gives you so much fun. In this kind of game you hardly ever get annoyed by others, so the game is pure fun and the atmosphere is very friendly. It doesn't create a toxic community which is hard to avoid as most social games do. I suggest to join their Discord (noted in their game description) to gather people to play together, otherwise you will not get the fun of most mutiplayer contents of the game.
Every time I click the game it traps me in a grey void after the Made with Unity splash screen
I walked around for an hour looking for a person,then I quit ,there are no people why is this
